# Community FAQ | Same Answer Every Time

<callout icon="❓" color="blue_bg">
	**COMMUNITY FAQ** | Same question, same clear answer, every time | All times SGT
</callout>

## The 3 Questions Everyone Asks

<callout icon="⭐" color="green_bg">
	**How do I join?** Register at https://TEAM-TO-ADD/registration, free with your NAS.com membership. Open Sun Jun 14 to Sat Jun 20. Challenge starts Sun Jun 21.
	**What is the prize?** $1,000 in Nas.com credits: Grand $500, Runner-Up $300, Honorable Mention $100, Community MVP $100.
	**When are winners announced?** Live at the Summit, Wed Jul 8, 11:00pm to 2:00am SGT. You must be present (we email everyone beforehand).
</callout>

## More Questions

<details color="gray_bg">
<summary>The basics</summary>
	- **What is this challenge?** You build your first AI marketing agent, an agent in Claude that every morning finds a fresh content idea for your business and writes you a ready-to-run prompt. 15 days, about 30 min a day.
	- **When does it run?** Day 1 is Sun Jun 21. Graduation is Sun Jul 5. The Summit is Wed Jul 8.
	- **Why is it 15 days, not 14?** Day 1 is a dedicated orientation day (join, set up your Claude Project, see the finished agent). Then 13 days of building, plus a graduation day. Same workload as last time, with one calm setup day added at the start so first-timers do not fall behind.
	- **How much time per day?** About 30 minutes. Two deadlines you cannot miss: Day 8 (Sun Jun 28) and Day 14 (Sat Jul 4).
	- **Do I need a product, tech skills, or a budget?** Something to market, yes. Tech or coding, no. Budget, no, it is free with your membership.
	- **What do I need before Day 1?** A Claude account (Projects), product details, who you sell to, 2 to 3 writing samples, and a phone for the Day 8 video.
</details>

<details color="gray_bg">
<summary>The agent</summary>
	- **What will my agent actually do?** Every day it gives you a fresh content idea and a ready-to-run prompt you can paste. No more blank page.
	- **My agent's ideas feel generic (around Day 6), help?** Normal at this stage. Make sure your Day 3 profile and Day 4 customer are detailed. Day 12 is a whole day for polishing this.
	- **Do I need the paid Claude plan?** [ team: confirm the exact plan members need ]. For now: a Claude account with Projects (https://TEAM-TO-ADD/claude-signup).
</details>

<details color="gray_bg">
<summary>The gates</summary>
	- **What is the Day 8 gate?** A 2-minute phone video. Show your agent produce one idea and say your biggest blocker. Post in #Day8 by 11:59pm SGT on Sun Jun 28. The only video in the challenge.
	- **What is the Day 14 gate?** Your final submission by 11:59pm SGT on Sat Jul 4, also your competition entry.
	- **I missed a gate, am I out?** Off the graduation and competition track, but you can still come to the Summit and your agent is still yours.
</details>

<details color="blue_bg">
<summary>Submitting (the most important one)</summary>
	- **What exactly do I submit on Day 14?** Three things, in three separate boxes: (1) your agent (link or 60 to 90 sec recording), (2) your one-page brief (doc or PDF), (3) one demo idea and prompt. Each box takes a link or a file. Video links welcome.
	- **Can I submit a video or a link instead of a file?** Yes. Every box accepts a link or a file.
	- **I only see one box, where does my video go?** The form has a separate box per item: agent, brief, demo. If something looks off, tell us and we will check immediately.
	- **Where is the submission form?** https://TEAM-TO-ADD/submission-form. Also pinned in #Day14.
</details>

<details color="gray_bg">
<summary>Prize and Summit</summary>
	- **What can I win?** $1,000 in Nas.com credits: Grand $500, Runner-Up $300, Honorable Mention $100, Community MVP $100. Issued via Nas.com after the Summit (about Jul 9).
	- **How do I enter the competition?** Just graduate. Your Day 14 submission is your entry, no separate form.
	- **Do I have to attend the Summit to win?** Yes. Winners are announced live (Wed Jul 8, 11:00pm to 2:00am SGT) and you must be present.
	- **What happens at the Summit?** 3 experts each build a different agent live, top graduates featured, winners announced. Join: https://TEAM-TO-ADD/zoom
</details>

<callout icon="🚩" color="orange_bg">
	**Escalation triggers (flag to Matt):** submission form broken or will not accept a file, check against the tested form (the number-one thing). Posting early then going silent, at-risk DM. Payout disputes, Danny. Same question twice, add it here.
</callout>

---
*Same question, same clear answer, every time. AI SCHOOL. NAS.com. CONFIDENTIAL.*
